title: Wireshark — packet 52846 OCSP request to ocsp-global.globalsign.com
html:
Wireshark packet 52846 from FINAL_forreal.pcapng — Microsoft-CryptoAPI/10.0 issuing an OCSP query to ocsp-global.globalsign.com from 192.168.157.134 (the VMware NAT lab guest). Same capture as the broader /ned.exe forensics screenshot.

wireshark · packet capture · network forensics · malware analysis lab

related.label: Wireshark capture — Windows update + cert revocation traffic from 192.168.157.134
